mapper.select: select t.agent_account as person from agent_manual_up_down_record t left join agent_info u on u.agent_account=t.agent_account where t.updated_time between #{beginTime} and #{endTime} and t.site_code = #{siteCode} and t.adjust_way = 1 and t.adjust_type = 1 and t.order_status = 6 and u.agent_type in (1,2)

SELECT a.super_agent_id as agentId, t.user_account as userAccount, sum(t.adjust_amount) as adjustAmount FROM user_manual_up_down_record t, user_info a WHERE a.user_account = t.user_account and t.created_time >= #{vo.startTime} and t.created_time <= #{vo.endTime} AND t.order_status = 6
AND a.super_agent_id IN
#{value}
AND t.adjust_way = #{vo.justWay} AND t.adjust_type = #{vo.manualType} and a.account_type in(2,3) group by a.super_agent_id, t.user_account, a.super_agent_id

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(adjust_amount),0) AS amount, COUNT(1) AS countTime, adjust_way as adjustWay FROM agent_manual_up_down_record WHERE adjust_way in (1,2) and adjust_type = 1 and agent_account = #{agentAccount} and order_status =6 group by adjust_way

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(adjust_amount),0) AS amount, COUNT(1) AS countTime, adjust_way as adjustWay FROM agent_manual_up_down_record WHERE adjust_way in (1,2) and adjust_type = 1 and agent_account = #{agentAccount} and order_status =6 and created_time >= #{min} and created_time <= #{max} group by adjust_way

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(a.adjust_amount), 0) FROM agent_manual_up_down_record a
AND a.agent_account = #{agentAccount} AND a.adjust_way = 1 AND a.adjust_type = 2 AND a.order_status = 6

SELECT a.agent_account, IFNULL(SUM(a.adjust_amount), 0) as allUpCommission FROM agent_manual_up_down_record a
AND agent_account IN
#{value}
AND a.adjust_way = 1 AND a.adjust_type = 2 AND a.order_status = 6
group by a.agent_account

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(a.adjust_amount), 0) FROM agent_manual_up_down_record a
AND a.agent_account = #{agentAccount} AND a.adjust_way = 2 AND a.adjust_type = 2 AND a.order_status = 6

SELECT a.agent_account, IFNULL(SUM(a.adjust_amount), 0) allUpCommission FROM agent_manual_up_down_record a
AND agent_account IN
#{value}
AND a.adjust_way = 2 AND a.adjust_type = 2 AND a.order_status = 6
group by a.agent_account

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(a.adjust_amount), 0) FROM agent_manual_up_down_record a
AND a.agent_account = #{agentAccount} AND a.adjust_way = 1 AND a.adjust_type = 3 AND a.order_status = 6

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(a.adjust_amount), 0) FROM agent_manual_up_down_record a
AND a.agent_account = #{agentAccount} AND a.adjust_way = 2 AND a.adjust_type = 3 AND a.order_status = 6
